steps.title: Use the new skeleton evidence
steps.content: Researchers once presumed T. navigans mainly used powered flight. The fuller skeleton showed short wings, long hind legs, a long neck, and a large crest, making sustained flight difficult and walking comfortable.

steps.title: Complete the reversal
steps.content: The conclusion should reduce the role of flight and increase the role of walking. A says longer flights, B says longer wings, and C says a smaller head, all contradicting or straying from the evidence. The answer is D.
